# Generated by apps/mods/stellaris/3x-bigger-worlds/scripts/build.py
# Multiplier: x3
# Transformations:
#   district_*_max_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   district_*_min_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   planet_max_districts_add  = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   produces = { res = N }    ->  res = N * 3  (positive numeric only)
# Untouched:
#   Negative values (blocker penalties stay at vanilla magnitude).
#   `@VAR` references (handled in scripted_variables/zz_bworlds_*).
#   `upkeep = { ... }` blocks (net deposit output therefore skews
#   3x-favorable on deposits with upkeep; see README).

##############################
#	Distant Stars Deposits	#
##############################

d_vast_unity_deposit = {
	resources = {
		category = orbital_research_deposits
		produces = {
			unity = 9
		}
	}

	habitat_modifier = {
		district_hab_science_max_add = 6
	}

	station = shipclass_research_station
	is_for_colonizable = no
	drop_weight = { weight = 0 }
}

### L-Cluster
d_nanites_deposit = {
	icon = d_nanite_corpses
	resources = {
		category = orbital_research_deposits
		produces = {
			nanites = 9
		}
	}

	habitat_modifier = {
		district_hab_science_max_add = 6
	}

	station = shipclass_research_station
	is_for_colonizable = no

	potential = {
		solar_system = { has_star_flag = lcluster }
		is_star = no
		is_colonizable = no
		NOT = { has_modifier = terraforming_candidate }
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 2
		modifier = {
			factor = 5
			is_planet_class = pc_gray_goo
		}
	}
}
